CHARGING VIA SOLAR PANELS (SOLD SEPARATELY)
-------------------------------------------

|PRODUCT_NAME| has two DC8020 input ports and is compatible with Jackery solar panels.

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: Solar charging connection diagram placeholder 1.
   :width: 360px

If one DC8020 input port needs to connect two solar panels simultaneously,
use a solar panel connector (sold separately, not included as standard).

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: Solar charging connection diagram placeholder 2.
   :width: 360px

**CAUTION**

One DC8020 input port can be connected to at most two solar panels.

**CAUTION**

Ensure the input voltage for both DC input ports is the same. Different voltages may damage the product. For example:

- Use the same model and the same number of solar panels when connecting both DC8020 input ports.
- Do not charge the product using both a car charger and a solar panel at the same time. Doing so may blow the car fuse or cause charging failure.

It is recommended to use Jackery solar panels. Ensure the open-circuit voltage (Voc)
of the solar panel is within the DC input range (16V-60V) of |PRODUCT_NAME|.
Jackery is not responsible for damage or loss caused by third-party solar panels.

CHARGING VIA A CAR CHARGER (SOLD SEPARATELY)
--------------------------------------------

This product can be charged using a 12V car charger.
Ensure the car charger and the 12V car power outlet (car cigarette lighter) provide a stable connection.

.. image:: _static/manual_en/01_meaning_of_symbols/fig.png
   :alt: Car charging connection diagram placeholder.
   :width: 360px

*The car charging cable is sold separately.*

**CAUTION**

- Start the vehicle before charging the power station.
- If the vehicle is running on bumpy roads, do not use the car charger. The Company is not responsible for loss caused by non-standard operation.
- Vehicle charging is only for 12V DC vehicles, not 24V DC vehicles. Do not charge this product in a 24V vehicle.
